recaptcha.title: Complete Verification
recaptcha.description: A browser window will open to complete a quick verification. This only needs to happen once.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate PerfectDraft
reauth_confirm.description: Your session has expired. Please re-enter your credentials.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid email or password, or verification failed.

abort.already_configured: This PerfectDraft account is already configured.
abort.invalid_auth: Authentication failed. Please check your credentials.
